info.title: Toggl.NormalizeBomAndEol
info.description: Removes BOM and normalizes line endings

options.name: -e
options.description: (Default: LF) Line ending (Values: CR | LF | CRLF)

options.name: --files
options.description: (Group: source) The paths to the files to normalize

options.name: --from-input-stream
options.description:
(Group: source) Indicates that the paths to the
files to be normalized are read from the standard
input stream (path per line).

options.name: --from-config-file
options.description:
(Group: source) Specifies the configuration file
that contains the paths to the files to be
normalized (path per line).

options.name: --stop-on-error
options.description:
Determines whether to stop processing if an error
is encountered.
